new_to_islam.name: Introduction to Islam — Complete Beginner's Path
new_to_islam.description: A 4-step reading journey for someone who wants to understand Islam from scratch.

steps.label: Start Here: What Islam Teaches
steps.why: The most acclaimed introduction to Islamic philosophy, presented at the Conference of Great Religions in 1896.

steps.label: The Prophet's Life
steps.why: Understanding the founder of Islam is essential to understanding the faith.

steps.label: The Holy Book
steps.why: The complete Quran with extensive English commentary for deep study.

steps.label: Islam in the Modern World
steps.why: See how Islamic principles apply to contemporary global challenges.

new_to_ahmadiyyat.name: Understanding the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community
new_to_ahmadiyyat.description: Learn about the beliefs, history, and mission of the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community.

steps.label: Core Beliefs
steps.why: The foundational text by the founder of the Ahmadiyya Muslim Community.

steps.label: The Promised Messiah's Claim
steps.why: The key theological argument: that Jesus survived the cross and the Promised Messiah has come.

steps.label: Islam and Reason
steps.why: The comprehensive case for Islam's compatibility with science and reason.

steps.label: The Living Caliphate
steps.why: The current Khalifa's vision for world peace — the leadership in action.

quran_study.name: Deep Study of the Holy Quran
quran_study.description: A structured approach to studying the Quran with commentary.

steps.label: Introduction & Context
steps.why: Historical context, themes, and how to approach Quran study.

steps.label: The Complete Commentary
steps.why: The full Quran with verse-by-verse English commentary across 5 volumes.

steps.label: Philosophy Behind the Teachings
steps.why: Deeper understanding of the Quran's philosophical framework.

defending_islam.name: Defending Islam — The Apologetics Toolkit
defending_islam.description: Books that address common criticisms of Islam with evidence and reason.

steps.label: Islam and Science
steps.why: The definitive response to 'Is Islam compatible with science?'

steps.label: Islam and Peace
steps.why: Proof that Islam advocates peace, not violence.

steps.label: The Jesus Question
steps.why: Historical evidence addressing one of the most debated topics in comparative religion.

children.name: Islamic Education for Young Readers
children.description: Age-appropriate books to introduce children to Islamic values and practices.

steps.label: First Steps (Ages 4-8)
steps.why: Beautifully illustrated, covers prayer, kindness, and basic Islamic practices.

steps.label: Growing in Faith (Ages 8-12)
steps.why: Fun rhymes that teach Islamic values in an engaging format.

academic.name: Islamic Scholarship — Academic Research Path
academic.description: Primary sources suitable for academic papers, theses, and research.

steps.label: Primary Theological Text
steps.why: A primary source frequently cited in religious studies.

steps.label: The Quran with Scholarly Commentary
steps.why: Extensive exegesis suitable for academic citation.

steps.label: Science & Religion
steps.why: Comprehensive academic treatment of the science-religion dialogue.

steps.label: Historical Investigation
steps.why: A scholarly investigation using historical and scriptural evidence.
